title: The Problem Solvers | Anton Osika at Lovable
summary: Lovable is a platform that allows anyone to build software through conversation without requiring an engineering team. The product reached millions of users within two months of launch and is built with Claude as its underlying foundation. Anton Osika, the founder, emphasizes trust as a key competitive advantage achieved through craft and partnership with Anthropic.
